competitors.label: webpack Tree Shaking

theirGaps: It is bundler-specific and less compact around the broader interview framing of why unused code sometimes stays in the bundle.

realWorldUseCases: When bundles stay fat, the debug question is usually where hidden side effects, barrel exports, or import shape prevented elimination.
followUpConfusion: If bundles stay large, check for CJS dependencies and unmarked side effects.
